style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like stardust, dissolving into iridescent petal-shaped aura particles that pulse softly with a pale pink and gold glow. The aura forms a delicate, blooming flower shape around Dittos body, radiating a warm, soft luminescence that refracts light into delicate rainbow halos. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
